title: After repeatedly creating and populating a table the server crashes with a message of 'pointer being freed was not allocated'
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test1 (Country String, Adult_HIV_ Float64, Adult_Obesity_ Float64, Aids_Deaths_est Int64, Airports Int64, Area_sq_km Int64);
INSERT INTO test1 (Country, Adult_HIV_, Adult_Obesity_, Aids_Deaths_est, Airports, Area_sq_km) VALUES ('CountryA', 1.5, NULL, 1000, 50, 100000);
INSERT INTO test1 (Country, Adult_HIV_, Adult_Obesity_, Aids_Deaths_est, Airports, Area_sq_km) VALUES ('CountryB', NULL, 20.5, 2000, 75, NULL);
SELECT Country, AVG(Adult_HIV_) AS Avg_HIV FROM test1 GROUP BY Country HAVING Avg_HIV IS NOT NULL;
key_bug_features: Repeatedly creating and populating a table causes server crash
